name: physeng
documentation:
# PhysEng

A collection of physics and engineering tools

functions.name: physeng.utilities.DateTimeFromDecimalYear
documentation:
Returns the datetime from a decimal year

Parameters
----------
year : float
    Decimal year

Returns
-------
datetime
    Datetime calculated from decimal year

methods.name: physeng.iso2768.ISO2768Length.grades
documentation:
Returns the known tolerance grades.

Returns
-------
ISO2768LengthGrades
    List of tolerance grades

methods.name: physeng.iso2768.ISO2768Length.gradesForDimension
documentation:
Returns the known tolerance grades for a given dimension.

Parameters
----------
dimension : Length
    Dimension

Returns
-------
ISO2768LengthGrades
    List of tolerance grades

methods.name: physeng.iso2768.ISO2768Length.dimensionsForGrade
documentation:
Returns the known dimension range for a given tolerance grade.

Parameters
----------
grade : str
    Tolerance grade

Returns
-------
ISO2768LengthDimension
    Dimension range as a tuple(Length, Length)

methods.name: physeng.iso2768.ISO2768Length.tolerance
documentation:
Returns the tolerance window for a given dimension and
tolerance grade.

Parameters
----------
dimension : Length
    Dimension
grade : str
    Tolerance grade

Returns
-------
ISO2768LengthTolerance
    Tolerance window in as a Length

methods.name: physeng.iso2768.ISO2768Length.toleranceAsFloat
documentation:
Returns the tolerance window for a given dimension and
tolerance grade in um

Parameters
----------
dimension : Length
    Dimension
grade : str
    Tolerance grade

Returns
-------
(float,float)
    Tolerance window in millimeter as a tuple(float, float)

methods.name: physeng.humidity.Humidity.saturationVaporPressureWagnerPruss
documentation:
Returns the saturation water vapor pressure according to Wagner
and Pruss (https://doi.org/10.1063/1.1461829) for a given temperature.

Parameters
----------
T : Temperature
    Temperature

Returns
-------
Pressure
    Saturation water vapor pressure

methods.name: physeng.humidity.Humidity.saturationVaporPressureAlduchovEskridge
documentation:
Returns the saturation water vapor pressure according to Alduchov
and Eskridge (https://doi.org/10.1175/1520-0450(1996)035%3C0601:IMFAOS%3E2.0.CO;2)
for a given temperature.

Parameters
----------
T : Temperature
    Temperature

Returns
-------
Pressure
    Saturation water vapor pressure

methods.name: physeng.humidity.Humidity.saturationVaporPressure
documentation:
Returns the saturation water vapor pressure according to Alduchov
and Eskridge (https://doi.org/10.1175/1520-0450(1996)035%3C0601:IMFAOS%3E2.0.CO;2)
for a given temperature.

Parameters
----------
T : Temperature
    Temperature

Returns
-------
Pressure
    Saturation water vapor pressure

methods.name: physeng.humidity.Humidity.waterVaporPartialPressure
documentation:
Returns the water vapor partial pressure for a given temperature and
relative humidity.

Parameters
----------
T : Temperature
    Temperature
relH : Dimensionless
    Relative humnidity

Returns
-------
Pressure
    water vapor partial pressure

methods.name: physeng.humidity.Humidity.absoluteHumidity
documentation:
Returns the absolute humidity for a given temperature and relative
humidity.

Parameters
----------
T : Temperature
    Temperature
relH : Dimensionless
    Relative humnidity

Returns
-------
Density
    Absolute humidity

methods.name: physeng.humidity.Humidity.dewPointLawrence
documentation:
Returns the dew point according to Lawrence
(https://doi.org/10.1175/BAMS-86-2-225) for a given temperature and
relative humidity.

Parameters
----------
T : Temperature
    Temperature
relH : Dimensionless
    Relative humnidity

Returns
-------
Temperature
    Dew point

methods.name: physeng.humidity.Humidity.dewPoint
documentation:
Returns the dew point according to Lawrence
(https://doi.org/10.1175/BAMS-86-2-225) for a given temperature and
relative humidity.

Parameters
----------
T : float
    Temperature in K
relH : float
    Relative humnidity [0,1]

Returns
-------
float
    Dew point in K

methods.name: physeng.humidity.Humidity.relativeHumidityFromAbsoluteHumidity
documentation:
Returns the relative humidity for a given temperature and absolute
humidity.

Parameters
----------
T : Temperature
    Temperature
ah : Density
    Absolute humidity

Returns
-------
Dimensionless
    Relative humnidity

methods.name: physeng.humidity.Humidity.dewPointFromAbsoluteHumidity
documentation:
Returns the dew point for a given temperature and absolute humidity.

Parameters
----------
T : Temperature
    Temperature
ah : Density
    Absolute humidity

Returns
-------
Temperature
    Dew point

methods.name: physeng.humidity.Humidity.relativeHumidityFromDewPoint
documentation:
Returns the realtive humidity for a given temperature and dew point.

Parameters
----------
T : Temperature
    Temperature
Td : Temperature
    Dew point

Returns
-------
Dimensionless
    Relative humidity

methods.name: physeng.humidity.Humidity.absoluteHumidityFromDewPoint
documentation:
Returns the absolute humidity for a given temperature and dew point.

Parameters
----------
T : Temperature
    Temperature
Td : Temperature
    Dew point

Returns
-------
Density
    Absolute humidity

methods.name: physeng.iso286.ISO286.grades
documentation:
Returns the known tolerance grades.

Returns
-------
ISO286Grades
    List of tolerance grades

methods.name: physeng.iso286.ISO286.gradesForDimension
documentation:

Parameters
----------
dimension : Length
    Dimension

Returns
-------
ISO286Grades
    List of tolerance grades

methods.name: physeng.iso286.ISO286.dimensionsForGrade
documentation:
Returns the known dimension range for a given tolerance grade.

Parameters
----------
grade : str
    Tolerance grade

Returns
-------
ISO286Dimension
    Dimension range as a tuple(Length, Length)

methods.name: physeng.iso286.ISO286.tolerance
documentation:
Returns the tolerance window for a given dimension and
tolerance grade.

Parameters
----------
dimension : Length
    Dimension
grade : str
    Tolerance grade

Returns
-------
ISO286Tolerance
    Tolerance window as a tuple(Length, Length)

methods.name: physeng.iso286.ISO286.toleranceAsFloat
documentation:
Returns the tolerance window for a given dimension and
tolerance grade in um

Parameters
----------
dimension : Length
    Dimension
grade : str
    Tolerance grade

Returns
-------
(float,float)
    Tolerance window in micrometer as a tuple(float, float)
